productContext.title: SoundPro Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds - IPX5 Waterproof Sports Earphones with Charging Case, 24H Battery Life

availableProducts.title: SoundPro Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds - IPX5 Waterproof Sports Earphones with Charging Case, 24H Battery Life

suggestedNegativeKeywords.reasoning: Free-seeking shoppers rarely convert on a $49.99 premium electronics product
Price-sensitive shoppers looking for budget options, not premium wireless earbuds
Shoppers looking for wired earphones, not wireless earbuds — different product type
Over-ear headphones are a different category altogether
Informational search intent, not purchase intent

referenceCampaigns.name: SP - Earbuds - Exact Match Core
referenceCampaigns.reasoning: High-intent exact match keywords protect the brand's core search terms. Dynamic up/down bidding maximizes conversion opportunities in a high-competition electronics category with CPCs up to $3.50.

referenceCampaigns.name: SP - Earbuds - Discovery Broad
referenceCampaigns.reasoning: Broad and phrase match keywords discover adjacent search terms. In a high-CPC electronics category, dynamic-up-only bidding protects against excessive spend while still winning placements. Strong negatives prevent bleeding budget on irrelevant headphone queries.

evaluationCriteria.name: Campaign Structure
evaluationCriteria.description: Campaign uses an appropriate type, targeting mode, and bid strategy for the product and goals.
checks: Campaign type is 'sponsored-products' (correct for a single ASIN product launch)
Bid strategy is dynamic (up-only or up-down) rather than legacy

evaluationCriteria.name: Keyword Selection
evaluationCriteria.description: Keywords are relevant, have appropriate match types, and cover both high-intent and discovery terms.
checks: At least 3 exact match keywords for high-intent targeting
At least 2 broad/phrase keywords for discovery
Keywords include feature-specific terms (waterproof, IPX5, sports)

evaluationCriteria.name: Negative Keywords
evaluationCriteria.description: Negative keywords effectively filter out irrelevant and low-converting search traffic.
checks: Negative keywords include 'wired' or 'over ear' (different product type)
Broad negatives cover audio-category terms that don't match earbuds

evaluationCriteria.name: Bid Configuration
evaluationCriteria.description: Bids are set at appropriate levels relative to product margin, competition, and keyword intent.
checks: Default bid is within reasonable range ($0.50 - $2.50)
Exact match bids are higher than broad match bids
No bids exceed max profitable CPC (AOV x CVR x Target ACoS = ~$0.87)
Bids account for high competition in electronics category

evaluationCriteria.name: Budget Allocation
evaluationCriteria.description: Daily budget is set appropriately for the product's sales velocity and goals.
checks: Daily budget is at least $15 (minimum for competitive electronics)
Daily budget is at most $150 (appropriate for a $49.99 product)
Budget accommodates at least 10 clicks per day at the default bid

missionBrief.title: Wireless Earbuds Launch Campaign
missionBrief.scenario: You are launching a new Amazon PPC campaign for the SoundPro Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds — a $49.99 pair of IPX5 waterproof sports earbuds with a 40% profit margin. Your target ACoS is 25%, meaning your break-even CPC is approximately $0.87 (AOV x CVR x Target ACoS). The electronics category is HIGHLY competitive, with major brands spending heavily. This means CPCs are high ($2-3 range for core keywords) and you'll need smart keyword selection and aggressive negatives to stay profitable. Your goal is to build a campaign structure that captures high-intent buyers while filtering out expensive, low-relevance traffic.
objectives: Choose the right campaign type and targeting mode for a single-ASIN electronics product
Select high-relevance keywords that balance volume with bid affordability
Add negative keywords to prevent wasted spend on related but irrelevant audio queries
Set a daily budget that allows competitive data collection without over-spending
Choose a bid strategy that balances visibility with profitability in a high-CPC category
tips: Wireless earbuds is a competitive category — exact match on high-intent terms is your bread and butter
Broad match in electronics can burn budget quickly; aggressive negatives are essential
'Wireless headphones' and 'bluetooth headphones' are NOT your product — negate them
Feature-specific keywords like 'waterproof earbuds' or 'IPX5 earbuds' have lower competition
With a 40% margin, you have some wiggle room — but at $2.50 CPC, every click matters
